qol.name: QoL Modpack
qol.description: The full experience. Performance optimizations plus quality-of-life features that enhance gameplay without giving unfair advantages.

mods.name: Sodium
mods.description: Modern rendering engine — massive FPS gains

mods.name: Iris Shaders
mods.description: Shader support compatible with Sodium

mods.name: Fresh Animations
mods.description: Smoother, more lifelike mob animations, textures, and sounds (via EMF, ETF, ESF)

mods.name: Continuity
mods.description: Connected textures — seamless glass, bookshelves, and more

mods.name: Controllable
mods.description: Full controller support, remappable bindings

mods.name: Shoulder Surfing
mods.description: Over-the-shoulder third-person camera

mods.name: Just Zoom
mods.description: Configurable zoom key

mods.name: AppleSkin
mods.description: Shows food saturation and hunger exhaustion

mods.name: Simple Voice Chat
mods.description: Proximity voice chat — required to hear and talk to nearby players

mods.name: Lithium
mods.description: General-purpose game optimization

mods.name: ImmediatelyFast
mods.description: Speeds up the rendering pipeline

mods.name: FerriteCore
mods.description: Reduces memory usage significantly

mods.name: BadOptimizations
mods.description: Misc engine optimizations that reduce overhead

mods.name: Clumps
mods.description: Groups XP orbs together to reduce lag on mob kills

mods.name: C2ME
mods.description: Concurrent Chunk Management Engine — parallelizes chunk loading across CPU cores

mods.name: Entity Culling
mods.description: Skips rendering entities you can't see

mods.name: Ambient Environment
mods.description: Dynamic weather, fog, and environmental visuals

mods.name: Ambient Sounds
mods.description: Adds immersive ambient audio to biomes

mods.name: Mouse Tweaks
mods.description: Faster inventory drag-and-scroll management

mods.name: WTHIT
mods.description: Tooltip showing block/entity info when looking at them

mods.name: Enchantment Descriptions
mods.description: Tooltip descriptions for every enchantment

mods.name: Mod Menu
mods.description: In-game mod configuration menu

mods.name: Bad Packets
mods.description: Networking library dependency

mods.name: Forge Config API Port
mods.description: Forge config system ported to Fabric

mods.name: Framework
mods.description: Required library for MrCrayfish mods (e.g. Controllable)

mods.name: Konkrete
mods.description: Common dependency used by several QoL mods

mods.name: Prickle
mods.description: Library dependency

mods.name: Searchables
mods.description: Shared search UI library

mods.name: PlaceholderAPI
mods.description: Placeholder resolution library

potato.name: FPS Boost
potato.description: For machines that need every frame they can get. Performance first, minimal extras.
